mapper.sql: id, title, business_type, method, request_method, request_url, request_param, response_result, status, error_msg, operator_id, operator_name, operator_ip, cost_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operation_log ( id, title, business_type, method, request_method, request_url, request_param, response_result, status, error_msg, operator_id, operator_name, operator_ip, cost_time, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{businessType}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{requestUrl}, #{requestParam}, #{responseResult}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{operatorIp}, #{costTime}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedTime}, #{deleted}, #{version} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_operation_log WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT FROM sys_operation_log WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND operator_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operatorName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND created_time >= CAST(#{startTime} AS TIMESTAMP)
AND created_time < CAST(#{endTime} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 day'
ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_operation_log WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND operator_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operatorName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
AND created_time >= CAST(#{startTime} AS TIMESTAMP)
AND created_time < CAST(#{endTime} AS TIMESTAMP) + INTERVAL '1 day'
